title: gnaphalon rupestre
intro: Gnaphalon rupestre is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin conditions. Gnaphalon rupestre can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
